provenance.source: Uses redacted synthetic conversation turns to verify the pre-send reviewer removes only repeated conversational acknowledgements, not direct technical decisions.

messages.text: That makes sense. Start by checking the current configuration.

cases.answer: That makes sense. Start with the source-of-truth configuration, then make the smallest reversible change.

messages.text: Use ASA for exposed outdoor parts.
What material should I use for the next outdoor bracket?

cases.answer: Use ASA for the next outdoor bracket because UV and heat resistance matter more than ease of printing.
cases.expectedPrefix: Use ASA for the next outdoor bracket
